ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "surface_description" TEXT /* Description of the track surface (e.g., Dirt, Turf) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of spectators the track can hold */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the track was opened */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the track's official website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the track */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race was held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Number of the race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in furlongs */,
  "prize_money" INTEGER /* Total prize money for the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., flat, steeplechase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Name of the horse's sire (father) */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Name of the horse's dam (mother) */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Color of the horse's coat */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer currently training the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary owner of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the jockey */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jockey */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the jockey in pounds */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the jockey in inches */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the jockey */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the trainer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the trainer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "program_number" INTEGER /* Program number of the horse */,
  "post_pos" INTEGER /* Post position of the horse */,
  "ml_odds" REAL /* Morning line odds of the horse */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the race */,
  "winning_time" TEXT /* Winning time of the race */,
  "final_odds" REAL /* Final odds of the horse */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the horse in the race (1st, 2nd, 3rd, etc.) */,
  "purse" INTEGER /* Purse amount won by the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horse_owners" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "finish_pos" INTEGER /* Finish position of the horse */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in furlongs */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the horse */,
  "winning_margin" TEXT /* Winning margin of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_history_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_history_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, owner, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., upcoming event, racing result) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
